title.en: A first-class invincible supreme asked curiously.

content.en:
"Qingyang Supreme, who is the invincible person you are talking about who is comparable to the son of the void? In this era of our Tianfeng Sea, there is no son of the void who is in the realm of a third-class invincible!"

A first-class invincible supreme asked curiously.

Qingyang Supreme immediately passed on some information to all the Supremes.

After these supremes received the information and intelligence about Ye Tian, they were immediately shocked.

"A new member, and he was promoted to an elite member in a short period of time, and now he has become a third-class invincible, how can he have such a fast promotion speed?"

Many Supremes were shocked.

They were all the top geniuses in the Tianlin Realm, but they didn't have such a fast promotion speed, compared to Ye Tian's strength improvement speed, they were almost waste.

Of course, if you go all out to cultivate an invincible person and don't care about the foundation problem, you can quickly promote to the third-class invincible realm, but in that case, your combat effectiveness will be very weak.

And when Ye Tian was in the realm of the third-rank invincible, he easily killed the third-class invincible of the Eternal Name-level power Netherworld Temple, and his combat power was suspected of being the combat power of the Son of the Void, which showed that Ye Tian's foundation was extremely solid, and his potential was far beyond their imagination.

In other words, Ye Tian was promoted so quickly on the basis of the most perfect foundation, which was too shocking.

"Going back and waiting for this third-class invincible named Ye Tian to return from the battlefield, we might as well let him participate in the assessment of the Void Son, if he can pass, our Heavenly Wind Sea is equivalent to having six Void Sons, which is the same as the number of Netherworld Children in the Netherworld Temple!"

"Agreed, but Ye Tian's safety must be guaranteed, I suggest sending more invincible people to Jinhe Tiandi, then use Jinhe Tiandi as the main battlefield of this war!"

"That's it!"

One Supreme One Supreme unified their opinions, and immediately issued an order, allowing more invincible people to rush to Jinhe Heaven and Earth, as if Jinhe Heaven and Earth were the main battlefield of the Heavenly Wind Sea and the Netherworld Temple.

All of a sudden, a large number of invincible people poured into Jinhe Tiandi.

--------------------

Ye Tian didn't know that he had attracted the attention of the Netherworld Hall and the high-level of the Heavenly Wind Sea, nor did he know that he had attracted a Void Child.

Even if he told him about the Children of the Void, he didn't know what the Children of the Void meant.

He continued to kill the invincible people of the Netherworld Temple, and if he returned to the Heavenly Wind Sea in the Heavenly Lin Realm, he was afraid that he would be able to receive a large amount of contribution points.

this day.

Ye Tian found a lone third-class invincible again, and as soon as this third-class invincible saw Ye Tian, he immediately showed a look of fear.

After all, in the eyes of the third-class invincible people of the Netherworld Temple, they had already treated Ye Tian as a son of the void.

Fighting against the Children of the Void, they are looking for death!

Help!

This third-class invincible didn't want to fight Ye Tian at all, so he asked for help as soon as possible, asking the other invincible people of the Netherworld Hall to take action together to fight against Ye Tian and wait for the arrival of the Void Son of the Netherworld.

After all, the Void Child of the Netherworld Temple is not in the Heavenly Lin Realm, and it will take time to summon it back.

Ye Tian's speed was very fast, and he immediately caught up with this invincible person, disrupting time and space, so that the other party could not tear apart time and space and leave.

In an instant, Ye Tian hit this third-class invincible man into a heavy blow.

It was also at this time that dozens of third-class invincible people descended.

And, they carried a lot of treasures.

Of course, they didn't think that they could kill Ye Tian with so many invincible people, what they had to do was to compete with Ye Tian so that Ye Tian couldn't kill any invincible person.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian fought with many third-class invincibles in the Netherworld Temple, and it was impossible for the third-class invincibles of the Heavenly Wind Sea to be indifferent.

Soon, the third-class invincibles of the Heavenly Wind Sea came to support.

With the support of the third-class invincibles of the Heavenly Wind Sea, the third-class invincibles of the Netherworld Temple protected them with a heavy treasure, and retreated into the Jinhe branch together, but the heavy treasure was also broken into pieces by the invincibles of the Heavenly Wind Sea.

However, protecting their safety at the cost of sacrificing a heavy treasure is not in vain.

Next, the invincibles of the Netherworld Temple did not come out of this branch, this branch arranged a large array, which was a large array blessed by a long time, which was enough to resist the attack of any third-class invincible, even some second-class invincibles could not break this formation.

And the second-class invincibles can't enter the foreign world, so they are still safe for the time being.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the other invincible people of the Heavenly Wind Sea took the opportunity to exterminate the other invincibles who had not had time to enter this branch, and suddenly many of the fourth and fifth rank invincibles in the Netherworld Hall were slaughtered by the invincible people of the Heavenly Wind Sea.

All of a sudden, the Netherworld suffered heavy losses.

However, the Netherworld Temple doesn't necessarily care about those weak invincibles, it cares about the lives of third-class invincibles.

The loss of a third-class invincible is enough to lose dozens or even more fourth-class invincibles!

After all, if a third-class invincible goes one step further, it is a second-class invincible.

Even in the eternal name level forces, the second-class invincible is also the real backbone, after all, the first-class invincible usually doesn't make much moves, and they are all working hard to impact the supreme, and many things are handled by the second-class invincible.

This shows how important the third-class invincible is and cannot be lost.

Finally this day.

A large number of third-rank invincibles from the Netherworld Temple, as well as a child of the void, descended on the Golden Harvest Heaven and Earth.

"Lord Luo Ge, this is the Golden Harvest World!"

A third-class invincible man stood in front of a proud young man.

This young man was dressed in a black robe, with a golden horn protruding from his forehead, and his body was full of noble aura, he was the genius of the Blood Horn Clan in the Heavenly Lin Realm, and the Blood Horn Clan was also one of the top racial forces in the Nether Temple.

The Blood Horn Clan has three first-class invincibles, and he is the son of one of them, and his talent surpasses that of his father, and he has earned the title of son of the void, and his reputation is resounding throughout the Tianlin Realm.

Therefore, he is qualified to be proud.

"A newly promoted eternal name-level force in the Heavenly Wind Sea, even dared to make a move with our Netherworld Temple, I remember that the Son of the Void of the Heavenly Wind Sea does not have the realm of a third-class invincible, even if this invincible person who is suspected of being a son of the void is good, but he is not a son of the void after all, he doesn't understand the power of the Son of the Void, if the Heavenly Wind Sea hides this third-class invincible, if he cultivates it well, he may really be able to give birth to another son of the void, but now he is going to fall here!"

Rogo said confidently.

After all, he is not only the son of the void, but after becoming the son of the void, his strength has improved a little, if it is not for the suppression of strength, otherwise he would have stepped into the realm of a second-class invincible.

Today, he would let the other invincibles know what the true Son of the Void is!
